Community Development Authority in Dubai launches the ‘Nuwat Dubai’ initiative under the Sheikha Hind Bint Maktoum Family Programme. The initiative aligns with objectives of the Dubai Social Agenda 33, which places families foremost among the priorities for social development through sustainable programmes that strengthen family cohesion and promote psychological and social wellbeing. It also highlights the pivotal role of the ‘Dubai Weddings’ programme in supporting families, enhancing their quality of life, and celebrating the achievements made possible through collective community efforts. @CDA_Dubai

According to information received by the Tehran Times, the U.S. government has responded to Iran's written proposal regarding the end of the war. By rejecting Tehran's proposals, the U.S. has once again reiterated its coercive stance, particularly regarding the nuclear issue. It is noteworthy that Iran presented its proposal based on a two-stage negotiation process, where the first stage would lead to the end of the war on all fronts, and if Iran's conditions were met, the second stage of negotiations, concerning the nuclear issue, would commence.
